The AI-powered portfolio site generator that turns professional data into a fully deployed personal website — in seconds. Built for businesses that need to create portfolios at scale.

Precise Portfolio AI

AI
Hi! I'm here to build your portfolio. What's your full name?
Type your answer...

Three Ways In

How It Works

Users can generate their portfolio through any of three intake modes — the system handles everything else automatically.

1

Structured Form

Fill in name, role, education, work experience, projects, and skills. Clean, guided, and fast — takes under 5 minutes.

2

AI Chat Intake

An AI chatbot interviews the user conversationally — asking the right questions, extracting all data, and building the portfolio automatically. No form needed.

Most Popular
3

Resume Upload

Upload a PDF resume. The AI parses it instantly — extracting all professional data and generating a complete portfolio site without any manual input.

Data Collected AI Processes Portfolio Live in <60 seconds

What You Get

Built for Scale. Ready for Business.

Instant Generation

From data submission to a fully deployed, live portfolio website in under 60 seconds. No developer, no waiting, no manual work.

White-Label Ready

Deploy under your own brand. Custom domain, your logo, your colors. Your clients never see "Precise Portfolio" — they see your product.

High-Volume Scale

Generate 100 or 10,000 portfolios. The system handles volume without degradation — built for platforms, agencies, and enterprises.

AI-Powered Content

The AI doesn't just format data — it writes compelling bio text, structures experience sections, and optimizes the portfolio for professional impact.

Mobile Responsive

Every generated portfolio is fully responsive — looks perfect on desktop, tablet, and mobile without any additional configuration.

Custom Development

Need something beyond the standard tool? Precision Tech Insights builds custom portfolio generation systems tailored to your exact workflow and requirements.

Ideal For

Built for Businesses That Need Portfolios at Scale

Precise Portfolio is not a tool for individuals — it is a platform for businesses that need to generate professional portfolio websites for a large audience, consistently and automatically.

Staffing & Recruitment Agencies

Generate candidate portfolios instantly for client presentations — no manual formatting required.

Universities & Training Institutes

Create professional portfolios for graduating students or trainees — at batch scale, automatically.

Freelance Marketplaces & HR Platforms

Offer portfolio generation as a value-added service to your users — white-labeled under your brand.

IT & Digital Services Companies

Like ITovio — use Precise Portfolio to deliver portfolio sites as a service to your own clients.

Production Proof

Used by ITovio in Production

ITovio, an IT services company, uses Precise Portfolio as their primary tool for generating portfolio websites for clients. This is not a demo environment — it is actively serving real users at scale, validating the tool's reliability and output quality.

portfolio.itovio.com

Live deployment — generating real portfolios for real clients

View Live Demo

Business Plans

Rent the Engine

All plans are rental-based. Free trial available for qualifying businesses. Contact us for current pricing.

Starter

100 sites/mo

Ideal for small agencies, boutique HR firms, and growing platforms just getting started.

  • All 3 intake modes
  • White-label branding
  • Standard support
Get Pricing
Best Value

Growth

1,000 sites/mo

For platforms with high-volume portfolio generation needs — universities, large agencies, marketplaces.

  • All 3 intake modes
  • White-label branding
  • Priority support
  • Analytics dashboard
Get Pricing

Enterprise

Custom volume

Unlimited sites, custom integrations, dedicated infrastructure, and full white-label deployment. Custom tool development also available.

  • Unlimited generation
  • Custom integrations
  • Dedicated support
  • Custom tool development
